generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values order and responsibility, I support giving our security agencies the tools they need to keep us safe. The last thing we need is politicians tying their hands with outdated civil liberties debates while real threats grow. We've seen what happens when agencies can't act decisively - remember the 2024 subway incident? That could have been so much worse. It's our duty to support those protecting us.
